name: Chocolate Candy Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour melted butter into the bottom of a 13x9-inch baking pan.
2. Sprinkle vanilla wafer crumbs evenly over the butter.
3. Sprinkle walnuts over the crumbs.
4. Add chocolate chips on top of the walnuts and coconut over the chocolate.
5. In a separate bowl, combine evaporated milk with brown sugar until smooth.
6. Pour the mixture evenly over the layers.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes.
8. Allow to cool for 1 hour.
9. Cut into 1-1/2 inch squares.
